def positive_django_migration_code_in_view():
    rule_id = "django_migration_code_in_view"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Django views or request paths reference schema or migration operations that belong in migrations."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
